changes.content: #[allow(dead_code)] // Used in tests; will be used in IOKit implementation (subtask-1-2)
changes.impact: Suppresses clippy dead_code warning for Sleeping enum variant

file_insights.context: SleepState enum definition; Sleeping variant intentionally unused in current implementation

patterns_discovered.name: pragmatic_lint_suppression
patterns_discovered.relevance: Bridges gap between current test usage and planned IOKit integration (subtask-1-2)

patterns_discovered.name: roadmap_aware_comments
patterns_discovered.description: Comments in suppress attributes reference specific future subtasks/features
patterns_discovered.relevance: Maintains traceability between lint suppressions and architectural plans

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Dead code variants in test-only contexts trigger clippy warnings
gotchas_discovered.context: Sleeping variant used in tests but not in production code path yet
gotchas_discovered.resolution_applied: Explicit allow attribute with forward reference to implementing subtask

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Single allow attribute can suppress multiple clippy rules
gotchas_discovered.context: dead_code is the primary lint; other rules may silently pass
gotchas_discovered.resolution_applied: Specific allow(dead_code) targets precise lint rather than blanket allow

discoveries.approach_outcome: SUCCESS - clippy/test failures resolved through targeted lint suppression with architectural justification

recommendations.recommendation: Document all #[allow(...)] suppressions with subtask references when code is intentionally unused
recommendations.rationale: Enables future developers to understand when unused code becomes active during phased implementation

recommendations.recommendation: Create a linting checklist that requires justification comments for all non-obvious suppressions
recommendations.rationale: Prevents accumulation of orphaned dead code; maintains intentionality in codebase

recommendations.recommendation: Consider extracting test-only enum variants or gating them with #[cfg(test)] if separate from IOKit path
recommendations.rationale: Clearer intent than dead_code suppression; reduces confusion about production vs test code
applies_to: SleepState enum and similar cross-purpose enums
